attributes.action: Make the CEO of Warhammer/GamesWorkshop change his legal name to James Workshop
attributes.additional_details: Please require them to change their legal name to “James Workshop”
attributes.background: The CEO of GamesWorkshop and Warhammer has control over the IP and is beholden to his board members to make changes to the lore, miniature creation, and more. Therefore, it is our request that he/she must beholden to change their name to reflect their power and status.
